title: Work-from-home share of all paid workdays (US)

source.name: Survey of Working Arrangements and Attitudes (SWAA)

notes: Illustrative approximation of SWAA's tracked WFH share of paid workdays: a 2019 pre-pandemic baseline, the 2020 lockdown peak, and the post-2023 plateau around one-fifth of days, which the survey's own reporting describes as stabilized.
